title: WORM audit store and persistent store family

tuw_evidence.title: Provision WORM audit log store with immutability settings
Measure RP03 audit gates on operational storage
Provision relational DB, ledger, search/vector, and object cache stores
Assemble W04 persistence and WORM evidence bundle

commands.command: jq -r '.work_packages[] | select(.wp_id=="LT-L1-W06" or .wp_id=="LT-L2-W01" or .wp_id=="LT-L3-W02" or .wp_id=="LT-L3-W03") | [.wp_id,.evidence.command_status,.evidence.classification] | @tsv' docs/launch/launch-tuw-status-audit.json
commands.purpose: Verify W04 predecessor state before claiming blocker evidence.
Verify no WORM or persistent store infra files exist.

commands.command:
test -f docs/launch/l3/worm-config.md; printf '%s
' $?; test -f docs/launch/l3/worm-rp03-precheck.md; printf '%s
' $?; test -f docs/launch/l3/data-layer-responsibility-map.md; printf '%s
' $?
commands.purpose: Verify WORM config, RP03 precheck, and data-layer responsibility map docs are absent.
Verify current audit ledger is in-memory, not an operational WORM store.

commands.command: rg -n "WORM audit store|Not provisioned|Audit restore target|LT-L3-W04" docs/launch/l3/rpo-rto-decision.md docs/launch/l3/monitoring-stack-decision.md docs/launch/l3/slo-definition.md docs/launch/l3/operations-dashboard-definition.md docs/goal-closeout/lt-l2-w01/command-evidence.json
output_summary: RPO/RTO decision draft states LT-L3-W04 WORM audit store is not provisioned.
Monitoring and SLO drafts depend on LT-L3-W04 WORM store and audit job.
L2-W01 evidence records audit ledger storage as in-memory and DB/WORM prerequisites as owner decision required.
commands.purpose: Verify downstream L3/L2 docs already depend on unprovisioned WORM storage.

commands.command: find packages scripts apps -maxdepth 4 -type f \( -name '*store*smoke*' -o -name '*worm*smoke*' -o -name '*ledger*smoke*' -o -name '*cache*smoke*' -o -name '*vector*smoke*' \) -print | wc -l
commands.purpose: Verify no store smoke scripts exist for W04 operational checks.

commands.summary: TUW total 344, WP total 72, violations 0, PASS

blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L3-W04.
This record does not provision WORM audit storage or persistent store infrastructure.
This record does not prove immutability, overwrite denial, append success, RP03 measurement, or store smoke tests.
This record does not update the audit ledger from in-memory to durable storage.
This record does not create or validate the seven-row data-layer responsibility map.
This record does not satisfy G4 or L3-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
